what_it_does: Stores YAML-frontmatter metadata for a channel attachment that points to a board item.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It belongs to channel 'dragnet-development' and has id 'att-da76afb4'.
standouts: Target uses a board:// URI scheme referencing item-796c81e4.
Attachment type is board_items, implying a board-item linkage.
File is a metadata stub with no explanatory text or payload.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
Represents attachments as separate markdown files under channel-memory/channel_attachments/.
References external entities with a URI-style identifier.
concerns: No title, description, or payload is provided, so meaning depends entirely on external systems.
The board:// URI cannot be resolved or verified from this file alone.
No author or modification history is recorded.
notes: This is a bare attachment metadata stub linking dragnet-development attachment att-da76afb4 to board item item-796c81e4.
questions: What content or discussion does board item item-796c81e4 represent?
Is there a separate payload file or body associated with this attachment?
What does the dragnet-development channel contain, and who added this attachment?
purpose_vs_actual: n/a — no explicit purpose statement is present; the metadata matches a board_items attachment record.
intention_signals: To create a persistent, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a specific board item in the dragnet-development channel.
novelty: The target is expressed as a board:// URI, and the file carries no additional content beyond the linkage metadata.
contribution: It preserves the exact attachment-to-board-item reference and its creation timestamp, which a fused system could use to reconstruct channel-board relationships.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment metadata file of type board_items that links dragnet-development attachment att-da76afb4 to board item item-796c81e4 and records an added timestamp, with no body content.
intention_for_embedding: To record that attachment att-da76afb4 in the dragnet-development channel is associated with board item item-796c81e4.
